statement: In every magma, Equation 498 (`x = y * (x * (z * (w * w)))`) implies Equation 2497 (`x = (y * ((x * x) * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0384
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op z (op w w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x x) y)) y)
